meaning: n.阿拉巴马州(美国的一个州)
examples: She wrote to her aunt in Alabama.
She was reunited with her boyfriend in the bus depot of Ozark, Alabama.
Zac recently returned another lost medal to a family in Alabama.
The bad press Saban received after leaving Miami continued in his first year at Alabama.
More than 25 people died in Phil Campbell, a town of about 1, 000 in north-west Alabama.
